app.name: Wernanmail
app.tagline: Full corporate mail that stays light — operators welcome.

login.title: Admin sign in
login.subtitle: Operator console for domains, queue, DNS, and delivery.

resources.title: Wernanmail resources
resources.hint: RAM, disk, and CPU used by the mail stack

deliverability.title: Deliverability
deliverability.recipientHint: Ask early recipients to mark messages Not spam and add the sender to contacts.
deliverability.noReportsHint: Publish DMARC with rua=mailto:… and wait for providers to send XML to postmaster@your-domain.
deliverability.noTlsReportsHint: Publish _smtp._tls TXT with rua=mailto:… — providers send JSON aggregates to that mailbox.

overview.healthyBody: Services look fine. Publish DKIM in DNS if it is still missing.
overview.healthyBodyOk: All systems are operating normally. Your mail server is receiving and delivering email as expected.
overview.attentionBody: Queue or failed jobs are elevated — check Queue or Quarantine, then DNS.
overview.dnsBody: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC for the domain. MX should point to this host.

setup.title: Setup — go live
setup.lead: {{done}} of {{total}} ready. Finish these so mail is trusted by Gmail and others.
setup.leadDone: All go-live checks look good. Keep an eye on Deliverability after you send.
setup.hostMissing: Set MAIL_HOSTNAME and MAIL_EHLO in .env to your real mail name (not localhost), then restart.
setup.tlsOk: TLS certificates are configured for the MTA.
setup.tlsMissing: Still on a temporary certificate — browsers will warn until Let's Encrypt is installed.
setup.tlsHint: On the server (Docker install): ./scripts/issue-tls-certbot.sh — DNS must already point here and port 80 must be open.
setup.mxMissing: At your DNS panel, add MX → your mail hostname (priority 10).
setup.authOk: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC are published.
setup.authMissing: Publish all three (SPF {{spf}} · DKIM {{dkim}} · DMARC {{dmarc}}). Use DNS helper for copy-paste values.
setup.ptrMissing: Ask your VPS provider to set PTR for the server IP to the same name as MAIL_EHLO.
setup.scoreDetail: Current score {{score}}/10 (aim for 8+ before inviting others).
setup.scorePending: Score appears after the first posture check.
setup.firewallHint: Firewall: allow 25 (mail in), 587/465 (send), 143/993 (IMAP), 80 and 443 (web + Let's Encrypt). Use 465/993 for older Outlook.

domains.title: Domains
domains.subtitle: Manage your mail domains, authentication, and storage quotas.
domains.confirmRotateDkim: Rotate DKIM? DNS must be updated to the new public key or mail signing will fail.
domains.confirmDelete: Delete domain {{name}} and all {{n}} mailbox(es)? This cannot be undone.
domains.selectorHint: Publish this selector’s TXT record from DNS helper after generating a key.
domains.selectHint: Pick a domain on the left to edit settings, DKIM, and quick-add mailboxes.
domains.aliasNeedTarget: Enter a local part and target mailbox
domains.aliasConflictsMailbox: Alias conflicts with an existing mailbox
domains.quotaHint: Leave empty to inherit the global default. Set unlimited on the mailbox itself.

mailboxes.title: Mailboxes
mailboxes.subtitle: Quotas, passwords, aliases, and open-as-user into webmail.
mailboxes.chooseDomain: Choose a domain to list mailboxes.
mailboxes.empty: No mailboxes yet — create the first one on the right.
mailboxes.selectHint: Or pick a mailbox on the left to edit quotas, aliases, filters, and open webmail as that user.
mailboxes.addHint: Create a mailbox on the selected domain.
mailboxes.confirmDelete: Delete mailbox {{addr}} and all its mail? This cannot be undone.
mailboxes.popupBlocked: Popup blocked — allow popups for this site
mailboxes.superuserOff: Enable superuser mode in Settings first
mailboxes.webmailUrlMissing: Set the webmail URL in Settings

filters.title: Filters
filters.hint: Rules run from top to bottom. The first enabled match wins.
filters.empty: No filters. Mail is delivered normally.
filters.folderHint: Use a simple folder name without slashes.

queue.title: Queue
queue.subtitle: Local and outbound delivery. Retry or delete failed jobs.
queue.empty: Queue empty — nothing waiting to send or deliver.

quarantine.title: Quarantine
quarantine.subtitle: Held messages — release to inbox or delete.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Mail, delivery, rate limits, antispam, security, and UI — grouped by category.
settings.langHint: Admin language is stored in this browser.

groupHints.mail: Message size, quotas, retention, body templates, and outbound footers.
groupHints.delivery: Relay and greylisting for inbound mail.
groupHints.rates: Caps on sending and SMTP connections.
groupHints.antispam: Score thresholds, RBLs, and reject text.
groupHints.security: Mailbox password policy and superuser access.
groupHints.alerts: Where to notify if the queue stalls or processes die. Prefer an external inbox or Telegram — not this same server.

settings.secretKept: saved (leave as-is or paste a new token)
settings.testAlertHint: Uses the current email / Telegram / webhook settings.

keys.mail.body_template_html: Body template (HTML). Same placeholders; without {{.Body}} the body is appended
keys.mail.footer_skip_replies: Skip template and footer on replies

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.subtitle: Full mail data, or a light config export for cloning settings.
backup.fullHint: Downloads mail.db + Maildir as a .tar.gz — same contents as scripts/backup-data.sh. Can take a while on large mailboxes.
backup.fullRestoreHint: To restore: stop the stack, then run scripts/restore-data.sh on the archive. Not offered in the browser (too easy to wipe a live server).
backup.hint: Domains, mailboxes, aliases, and settings — no passwords, DKIM private keys, or message bodies.
backup.restoreHint: Merges settings/domains, creates missing mailboxes (disabled, password must be set), and remaps aliases. DKIM private keys and Maildir messages are not restored.

dns.title: DNS setup helper
dns.body: Publish these for {{name}} so delivery and spoofing checks work.
dns.footer: Also set PTR on the outbound IP.
